offer: For hospitality accountants processing 5–15 invoices/week, inaccurate cost tracking causes cash flow gaps. We provide weekly cost analysis reports instead of manual data entry into spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate cost tracking from manual receipt entry.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for hospitality accountants
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to hospitality accountants with demo video
Community forums where accountants share tools
try_it: Let users try weekly report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant community
